Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tomb Hydra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The Tomb Hydra is a guardian described as a baby Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The Tomb Hydra is powerful enough to cause a Sage to tremble in fear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The Tomb Hydra is a creature found in a honeycomb-like room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The Tomb Hydra is a dreadbeast with a parasitic madra system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The Tomb Hydra's blood covered much of the floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Tomb Hydra has a binding that Lindon is examining.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — A Tomb Hydra emerged from a slick bulbous sac in the upper chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The Tomb Hydra has a beating, throbbing heart-shaped binding.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
